claimText: KFUPM's AI+X page says all undergraduate students are required to complete AI-focused coursework and states an institutional goal to graduate 10,000 AI-skilled professionals by 2030.
normalizedValue: AI-focused coursework requirement and 2030 AI-skilled graduate goal stated on the AI+X page.

citation.publisher: King Fahd University of Petroleum & Minerals
